page_metadata.biotools__summary: A toolkit for multiomics data integration for phenotypic space exploration. Phenonaut allows users to describe their data and apply a series of generic or specialised data-centric transforms and measures.
page_metadata.bioschemas__summary: A toolkit for multiomics data integration for phenotypic space exploration. Phenonaut allows users to describe their data and apply a series of generic or specialised data-centric transforms and measures.
